visual_enhancers.surface_strategy: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look). Expose the skeleton. Data-heavy dashboards should use border-collapse style layouts.
visual_enhancers.shadows: None. Use 1px sharp borders (border-zinc-200) instead of shadows to maintain a strict, clinical, objective feel.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid border-zinc-200. Sharp corners (rounded-none) or very minimal radius (rounded-sm max 4px).
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Not recommended for this clinical dashboard as data needs absolute clarity without visual refraction. Use Flat Solid instead.

grids_and_layouts.dashboard_grid: High Density Grid Protocol. Base Grid: grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12. Gap Strategy: Tight (gap-0 to gap-px) using a border-collapse technique where items share borders. Every pixel must be utilized. Use h-full on children.
grids_and_layouts.spacing: Generous inner padding for cells (p-6 or p-8) despite tight gaps between cells. Containers with borders must have internal padding.
grids_and_layouts.alignment: Paragraphs, labels, and tabular data left-aligned. Center-align only if strictly needed for visual balance.

motion.hover_states: Crisp and instant. bg-white changes to bg-zinc-50. Text color explicitly changes (e.g. text-zinc-600 to text-zinc-900).
motion.transitions: Use specific properties (transition-colors duration-200, transition-transform duration-200). DO NOT use 'transition-all'.
motion.micro_interactions: Subtle -translate-y-[1px] on actionable cards or buttons, but keep data widgets entirely static for stability.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 ratio for normal text. Use APCA guidelines. Tinted grey backgrounds must have high-contrast text.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

icons.usage_rules: Use Duotone or Regular weights. Essential for medical and data representation. DO NOT use emojis.

images.description: Female medical researcher looking through microscope in a lab
Artistic rendering of a DNA strand with particle effects against a dark background
images.category: Data / AI Analysis State / Upload State background

libraries_and_components.charts: Chart.js (strictly required as per constraints). Use it for SHAP visualizations (waterfall/bar), risk probabilities (doughnut/progress), and prediction trends (line).
libraries_and_components.ui_components: Shadcn UI (Tables, Dialogs, Select, Tabs, Progress). Customize them heavily to remove Vercel/Stripe look. Strip rounded borders, make them flat and sharp.
libraries_and_components.toast: Use 'sonner' for notifications (success/error on CSV upload, prediction generation).
libraries_and_components.3d_creative: Not recommended to use heavy 3D for clinical dashboards. Stick to high-quality 2D charts (Chart.js) and clean typography for data trust.

instructions_to_main_agent: You MUST use Manrope for headings and JetBrains Mono for body/data. Import these from Google Fonts in index.css.
Build a sidebar layout with a collapsed state for the dashboard. The main content area should use a CSS Grid with strict borders separating sections (like a bento box, but professional).

For the 'Explainable AI' reports, use Chart.js to build horizontal bar charts showing SHAP values (positive/negative feature impacts). Color positive impacts in Clinical Blue (#2563EB) and negative impacts in Critical Red (#E11D48).
Implement the CSV Upload page with a dashed border dropzone. Use the DNA strand image as a subtle background pattern or side visual.
Do NOT use transparent backgrounds on dropdowns or sticky headers without backdrop-blur.
Ensure all data cells, inputs, and buttons have explicitly defined hover, focus, and active states.
Use Tailwind's data-[state=active] selectors for Tabs and other Shadcn components to style them with sharp borders.
All components should be in .js/.jsx, not .tsx. Remove any TypeScript typings.
universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Avoid the 'AI slop' aesthetic by implementing the strict 'Grid Borders' surface strategy with sharp edges and no shadows.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Create depth through border hierarchies, not shadows.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like transition-colors.
You MUST NOT center align the app container. No .App { text-align: center; }.
Always use modern pill-shaped or sharp button styles with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style. Here, use sharp (rounded-none).
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons. Use @phosphor-icons/react.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Components MUST use named exports, Pages MUST use default exports.
